name: recoil_app_start_engine_and_queue_startup_state
description: RecoilApp::StartEngineAndQueueStartupState starts the engine for the main window, shuts down/exits on failure, and on success queues the pending startup state with skip-wait set.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /DUINT_PTR=UINT /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?StartEngineAndQueueStartupState@RecoilApp@@QAEHXZ at 0x442c10 still fails: 111 unmasked mismatches, 16 relocation bytes masked, 14 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 91 bytes, VC object symbol size 144 bytes.

Reviewed difference is vtable-call spelling: current source routes through ReadRecoilVtableSlot helper calls, while the original emits direct vtable slot calls. The success/failure control flow, startup-state queuing, shutdown call, and ExitInstance return behavior match the Binary Ninja contract.
The native smoke validates the StartEngine hwnd argument, success path queue state, skip/reserved flags, startup-state OnEnter callback, and failure path ShutdownEngine/ExitInstance calls.
